sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114406" key="xordologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορδο-λογέω</orth>, <sense id="n114406.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">touch the strings</tr_> before playing, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.87f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
